annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone overlay visibility, highlighting, shader preview, and Snap Assist.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Show the zone overlay on all screens.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Hide the zone overlay.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Returns true if the overlay is currently visible.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if overlay is visible.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Highlight a single zone by UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone UUID to highlight.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Highlight multiple zones at once.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: List of zone UUIDs to highlight.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Clear all zone highlights.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get the overlay poll interval in milliseconds.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Poll interval in milliseconds.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get the minimum zone size in pixels.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Minimum zone size in pixels.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get the minimum zone display size in pixels.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Minimum zone display size in pixels.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Show shader preview overlay at given screen coordinates (called from editor Shader Settings dialog).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Global X coordinate for preview top-left.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Global Y coordinate for preview top-left.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Preview width in pixels.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Preview height in pixels.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen name (empty = screen containing x,y).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Shader UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON map of uniform names to values (from translateParamsToUniforms).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON array of zone objects (x,y,width,height in preview pixel coords).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Update existing shader preview geometry and/or params.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Preview X position.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Preview Y position.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Preview width.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Preview height.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Updated shader parameters JSON.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Updated zones JSON.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Hide and destroy the shader preview overlay.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Show Snap Assist overlay with candidate windows. Called by KWin effect after dragStopped when snapAssistRequested is true.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen where the snap occurred (e.g. DP-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON array of {zoneId, x, y, width, height} for empty zones.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON array of {windowId, kwinHandle, icon, caption} for candidate windows.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if overlay was shown.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Hide the Snap Assist overlay.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Returns true if Snap Assist overlay is visible.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if Snap Assist is visible.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Deliver a window thumbnail from KWin script (WindowThumbnail + grabToImage). Called by plasmazones-snapassist script.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: KWin internal UUID (EffectWindow::internalId().toString()).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: data:image/png;base64,... thumbnail image.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when overlay show/hide state changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if overlay is visible.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when the highlighted zone changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Currently highlighted zone UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when Snap Assist overlay is shown. KWin script subscribes to create thumbnails via WindowThumbnail and call setSnapAssistThumbnail.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen where snap occurred (e.g. DP-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON array of empty zones.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON array of candidate windows with kwinHandle.
